news.summary: California state agencies are progressing towards accepting crypto payments with the advancement of Assembly Bill 1180. The bill has received approval to proceed, showing a positive step towards integrating cryptocurrencies into state agency transactions. This move indicates a shifting landscape with more acceptance towards digital currencies in government operations.
news.headline: California state agencies closer to accepting crypto payments as Assembly Bill 1180 advances.
EU'S SEFCOVIC: I INFORMED MY CHINESE COUNTERPART ABOUT THE ALARMING SITUATION IN THE CAR SECTOR BECAUSE OF THE RARE EARTH MAGNET RESTRICTIONS

news.summary: London, June 4, 2025 - DRUID AI, a top Enterprise Agentic AI platform specializing in automation, has been acknowledged by Microsoft as the initial AI solutions provider in healthcare for Central & Eastern Europe, Middle East, and Africa. This recognition solidifies DRUID AI's position as a trailblazer in the industry.
news.headline: DRUID AI gets Microsoft certification for AI in Healthcare, first in Central & Eastern Europe, Middle East and Africa.

news.summary: In an epic collaboration taking place in Irving, Texas on June 4, 2025, the world's largest convenience retailer, 7-Eleven, Inc., is joining forces with Universal Pictures and Amblin Entertainment to mark the birth of a new Jurassic era. This colossal partnership will bring a wave of excitement this summer, showcasing the crossover between retail and entertainment giants. Stay tuned for an unforgettable experience as these industry leaders unite, promising a truly massive celebration.
news.headline: 7-Eleven partners with Universal Pictures and Amblin Entertainment for Jurassic World Rebirth, a massive crossover.

news.summary: In London, Token.io has disclosed a strategic investment from HSBC, showcasing their ongoing partnership and commitment to providing innovative payment solutions. This investment highlights the focus on delivering cutting-edge payment solutions and strengthening their collaboration.
news.headline: Token.io receives strategic investment from HSBC, strengthening collaboration for innovative payment solutions in London.
UK's PM Starmer: We are working on bringing US tariffs on UK steel to zero

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, the Inter-American Development Bank (IDB) announced Laura Alfaro as its new Chief Economist and Economic Counselor. Ms. Alfaro was chosen after a rigorous selection process. She is known for her vast knowledge in economic research and public policy, specifically in Latin America.
news.headline: Laura Alfaro appointed as Chief Economist and Economic Counselor at Inter-American Development Bank.

news.summary: Stratford, Connecticut - On June 4, 2025, KUBTEC® achieved a significant achievement by commemorating its 20th year in providing cutting-edge X-ray cabinet systems that have revolutionized healthcare and research globally. Established in 2005, the company has become a leading player in the industry, impacting numerous fields with its innovative technology.
news.headline: KUBTEC® marks 20 years of innovation with advanced X-ray cabinet systems transforming clinical care and research globally. Founded in 2005.
EU's Sefcovic: We agreed on how to restructure the focus of our negotiations with the US

news.summary: A new program called Altcoin LiquidityBoost has been launched, offering rebates of up to 1 basis point. This initiative aims to address the liquidity gap for altcoins and enhance existing programs, benefiting both users and token projects. The program is introduced by Binance, a leading global blockchain ecosystem with a user base exceeding 275 million. The initiative is set to boost liquidity in the altcoin market, providing support and opportunities for various token projects.
news.headline: Binance introduces Altcoin LiquidityBoost Program with rebates up to 1 bps to enhance market diversity. Trusted by 275M users.

news.summary: Scholarships have been awarded to aid in addressing food insecurity in Canada. The Maple Leaf Centre for Food Security and Maple Leaf Foods (TSX: MFI) have revealed the winners of the 2025/26 Maple Leaf Board Scholarships in Food. The recipients will embark on new research initiatives to combat this issue. The announcement was made in Mississauga, ON on June 4, 2025. This initiative underscores the ongoing efforts to tackle food insecurity and promotes innovation in the field.
news.headline: Maple Leaf Centre awards $60,000 in scholarships to combat Canada's food insecurity.

news.summary: The latest findings from an ongoing Phase 1 single-ascending dose trial have shown promising safety and pharmacokinetics results. The trial, which is currently blinded, has revealed encouraging data indicating positive outcomes. This early data highlights the favorable safety profile and pharmacokinetic properties of the investigational product. The trial is progressing smoothly, and initial results suggest strong potential for the drug's safety and effectiveness. The trial's success is underscored by the reliable data obtained thus far, setting a solid foundation for continued research and development.
news.headline: Design Therapeutics begins dosing Friedreich Ataxia patients outside U.S. in RESTORE-FA Phase 1/2 trial of DT-216P2. Phase 1 single-dose trial shows positive safety and pharmacokinetics.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 4, 2025, Carbon Upcycling Technologies Inc. (Carbon Upcycling) and TITAN Group (TITAN) have signed a Memorandum of Understanding. Carbon Upcycling focuses on carbon and waste utilization, while TITAN is a prominent international player in building and infrastructure materials. The agreement signifies a collaboration between the two companies, representing significant progress in the industry. This partnership aims to leverage Carbon Upcycling's expertise with TITAN's market presence, potentially leading to innovative solutions for environmental sustainability.
news.headline: Carbon Upcycling and TITAN Group partner for low-carbon construction materials; leader in carbon utilization and a major industry player collaborate.

news.summary: Lynkwell has selected Nayax as its primary payment provider for their network of thousands of electric vehicle (EV) chargers throughout North America. This partnership will cover a wide range of chargers available for public use across various locations in the region. The agreement between Lynkwell and Nayax signifies a strategic move towards enhancing payment solutions for customers utilizing their services. The extensive network of EV chargers will be equipped with Nayax's payment technology to facilitate seamless transactions for users.
news.headline: Nayax partners with Lynkwell to enhance EV charging accessibility, profitability, and scalability, with thousands of chargers across North America.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, VersaBank revealed a quarterly cash dividend declaration for its Common Shares at CAD $0.025 per share. The dividends are set to be payable on July 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of that same date. VersaBank's stock is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol VBNK, and on the NASDAQ exchange under the same symbol.
news.headline: VersaBank (TSX: VBNK) declares CAD $0.025 dividend per share for quarter ending July 31, 2025. Payable to shareholders on July 31, 2025.

news.summary: A revolutionary cookbook has been introduced by the Bon Society in Seattle on June 4, 2025. This cookbook aims to transform the concept of dessert into a movement. Emphasizing boldness, artistry, nutrition, and a futuristic approach, this new release is set to captivate food enthusiasts. The cookbook promises to be a game-changer, offering innovative recipes and ideas to the audience.
news.headline: Bon Society releases revolutionary cookbook, transforming dessert into a movement. Bold, artistic, futuristic. Seattle, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto on June 4, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE:IDK) (OTCQX:IDKFF), a venture capital firm from Canada specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, extends congratulations to AI/ML Innovations Inc. (CSE: AIML) on securing a Letter of Intent (LOI). The LOI, established between Neural Cloud Health Inc. (a subsidiary of AIML) and Circular Health Limited, involves the integration and licensing of Neural Cloud’s ECG signal-processing platform, MaxYield™.
news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. supports AI/ML Innovations Inc. in licensing MaxYield™ to Circular Health Ltd. (CSE: AIML)(OTCQX: IDKFF).

news.summary: Shipments from a manufacturing facility in Hungary are set to include the first deliveries of smart safety syringes, specifically SecureGard™ and SoloGard™.
news.headline: Sharps Technology fulfills 3 customer orders with shipments of SecureGard™ and SoloGard™ smart safety syringes from Hungary.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, DispatchHealth finalized its merger with Medically Home, combining clinical care, technology, logistics, and scale to streamline the treatment of serious health needs in the most comfortable settings. This merger marks a significant development in the healthcare sector, bringing together key expertise to enhance patient care. The consolidation aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness in delivering care where people are most at ease. This strategic move is set to transform the healthcare landscape, with the merged entity poised to provide services with a wider reach and diverse capabilities. The merger is expected to positively impact a large number of patients, improving access to quality healthcare and advancing the standards of medical services.
news.headline: DispatchHealth and Medically Home have merged to create a national platform for complex care at home, combining clinical care, technology, and logistics.

news.summary: On June 3, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Eldorado Gold Corporation reported the successful election of all director nominees listed in the Management Proxy Circular dated April 15, 2025, at the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting resulted in the election of the company's directors for the upcoming term, displaying a unified support towards the leadership.
news.headline: Eldorado Gold elects all director nominees at 2025 Shareholders Meeting in Vancouver, British Columbia on June 3.

news.summary: A recent agreement between Elpis Biopharmaceuticals has put the spotlight on the development of armored and bispecific CAR-γδTs focused on treating acute myeloid leukemia (AML) and multiple myeloma. The company, based in Lexington, Mass., partnered with a firm in Singapore on this initiative on June 4, 2025. Elpis is known for its innovative approach in creating these therapies for solid tumors. The collaborative effort aims to advance these CAR-T treatments targeted at these specific types of cancers.
news.headline: Elpis Biopharmaceuticals partners with Singapore General Hospital to develop CAR technologies for AML and myeloma.

news.summary: Trucordia, based in Lindon, Utah and New York, disclosed on June 4, 2025, that it has secured a $1.3 billion strategic investment from the renowned global investment firm Carlyle. This transaction sets Trucordia on a path towards enhanced growth by optimizing its capital structure and streamlining its governance.
news.headline: Trucordia secures $1.3B investment from Carlyle for growth. Improved capital structure expected.

news.summary: The collaboration aims to establish an extensive clinical pathway for Revita in post GLP-1 weight maintenance, subject to FDA approval, with the potential to assist millions of qualifying patients.
news.headline: Fractyl Health and Bariendo are partnering to offer Revita® across 35 centers countrywide, aiming to benefit millions.

news.summary: A health study has found that over 25% of adults in the country are considered obese, with a BMI of 30 or higher. The research also revealed that more than 40% of adults have a BMI classified as overweight, indicating a widespread issue of unhealthy weight levels in the population. The study, conducted on a sample of 10,000 individuals, highlights the need for increased awareness and interventions to address the growing obesity epidemic. Experts are calling for urgent action to promote healthier lifestyles and combat the rising rates of weight-related health issues in the country.
news.headline: Upstream Bio to attend the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. #biotech #GSHealthcareConf

news.summary: In a move to boost Fabriq's global reach, Expedition Growth Capital has taken the lead in providing growth equity funding. Fabriq, a leading Lean Daily Management (LDM) SaaS platform for frontline manufacturing teams, recently finalized a $25 million investment to facilitate its expansion efforts. This funding injection is aimed at accelerating Fabriq's growth on an international scale, enabling the company to further empower manufacturing teams around the world.
news.headline: Fabriq receives $25 million in funding to boost lean manufacturing operations and global expansion.

news.summary: Vancouver-based Core Gaming and Guangzhou WeiXuan have announced a collaboration to create AI-driven mobile tools that extend beyond gaming applications. The partnership aims to concentrate on developing scalable AI solutions for everyday use with tangible real-world benefits. The agreement was disclosed on June 4, 2025. Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA, SYTAW), referred to as "Siyata," is at the helm of this endeavor.
news.headline: Core Gaming partners with Guangzhou WeiXuan to develop AI-powered mobile tools beyond gaming for real-world impact.

news.summary: Information Services Corporation (ISC) has announced its intention to conduct a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) to buy back up to 929,007 Class A shares over a twelve-month period starting from June 6, 2025. This amount represents about 5% of the total 18,580,146 Class A shares outstanding as of June 2, 2025. The bid will be carried out through the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) or alternative trading systems, with the option to purchase shares through private agreements or share repurchase programs if approved by regulatory authorities. Purchases through private agreements may be at a discount to the prevailing market price.
news.headline: ISC launches Normal Course Issuer Bid to buy back 929,007 Class A shares (~5% of total shares) over 12 months.

news.summary: The company has been given an extension until June 30, 2025, to meet Nasdaq's Equity Rule requirement and regain compliance.
news.headline: Helius Medical Technologies complies with Nasdaq Bid Price Rule; extension granted until June 30, 2025 to meet Equity Rule.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in New York, a campaign called "Heart & Stroke" was launched by Mediaplanet with the aim of raising awareness about the leading causes of death globally: heart disease and stroke. Even though these health issues are responsible for a significant number of deaths, the campaign emphasizes that they can be managed effectively with proper information and care. This initiative seeks to provide vital knowledge and support to tackle this critical issue.
news.headline: Heart & Stroke campaign launched by Mediaplanet featuring Susan Lucci aims to tackle leading causes of death worldwide.
Corvus Pharma reveals full data from Cohort 3 of placebo-controlled Phase 1 trial for Soquelitinib in Atopic Dermatitis.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Inventus Mining Corp. (TSXV: IVS) shared positive drilling findings from the initial 5,000-tonne bulk sample location at the entirely owned Pardo Gold Project. This project is situated 65 km northeast of Sudbury, Ontario.
news.headline: Inventus reports 3.84 gpt gold over 1.82m at 007 North bulk sample site in Pardo Gold Project, Ontario.

news.summary: A prominent cancer research institution has decided to implement the Veeva Clinical Platform to improve the efficiency of their study operations. The collaboration between Veeva Systems and Sarah Cannon Research Institute (SCRI) was disclosed on June 4, 2025. Veeva Systems, listed under NYSE as VEEV, will be working closely with SCRI to enhance study delivery and overall research processes. This partnership aims to streamline operations and is expected to significantly impact the research outcomes within the oncology field.
news.headline: Veeva Systems and Sarah Cannon Research Institute partner to advance oncology trials with Clinical Platform.

news.summary: Tallinna Vesi (TVE1T) will finalize its list of shareholders eligible for dividend payment on June 10, 2025, at the close of the settlement system's working day. The ISIN code for this transaction is EE3100026436.
news.headline: AS Tallinna Vesi (TVE1T) will close list of shareholders for dividend payment on June 10, 2025.

news.summary: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) has disclosed that Astellas has opted for Veeva Vault CRM worldwide and Veeva China CRM specifically for China. The move is geared towards enhancing Astellas' commercial responsiveness and operational capabilities. As of June 4, 2025, the transition was confirmed and it highlights the commitment to leverage innovative solutions to drive business effectiveness. This decision will impact Astellas' operations on a global scale by integrating sophisticated CRM technologies to manage customer relationships efficiently. The utilization of Veeva Vault CRM and Veeva China CRM signifies Astellas' strategic approach to streamline processes and maximize commercial outcomes.
news.headline: Astellas selects Veeva Vault CRM globally including Veeva China CRM. Boost in commercial agility.

news.summary: In Monterey, California on June 4, 2025, the California Insurance Wholesalers Association (CIWA) disclosed that Kurt Warner, NFL Hall of Famer and Super Bowl Champion, will be the keynote speaker at the 2025 Summer Forum. Scheduled from July 20-22, the event is eagerly awaited by industry professionals.
news.headline: CIWA welcomes NFL legend Kurt Warner as VIP speaker for Summer Forum 2025 in Monterey, CA from July 20-22.

news.summary: Today, Fortis Inc. disclosed that 11,298 out of its 7,665,082 Cumulative Redeemable Five-Year Fixed Rate Reset First Preference Shares, Series H were converted into Cumulative Redeemable Floating Rate First Preference Shares, Series I, on a one-for-one basis. Additionally, 248,830 of its 2,334,918 Series I Shares were converted into Series H Shares at the same ratio. Following these conversions, Fortis now has 7,902,614 Series H Shares and 2,097,386 Series I Shares in circulation. Both Series H Shares and Series I Shares will remain listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) using the symbols FTS.PR.H and FTS.PR.I, respectively.
news.headline: Fortis Inc. converts 11,298 Series H Shares into Series I Shares and 248,830 Series I Shares into Series H Shares.

news.summary: A private equity firm, Brightstar Capital Partners, has recently acquired KZF Design, a company specializing in architecture, engineering, and design. The acquisition was announced today, with Mike Burke, former Chairman and CEO of AECOM, appointed as the Chair of KZF's Board of Directors. Brightstar focuses on investing in various sectors including business services, industrials, consumer, and government services. The acquisition signifies a strategic move by Brightstar to expand its portfolio within the design and architecture industry.
news.headline: Private equity firm Brightstar Capital Partners acquires KZF Design, establishing a platform in architecture industry. Mike Burke, former Chairman and CEO of AECOM, is the Chair of KZF's Board of Directors.

news.summary: Nexans recently launched a groundbreaking project called Stella Nova, focusing on electrifying data hall infrastructures within data centers. This project marks a significant milestone in the industry as it is the first of its kind globally. The initiative aims to revolutionize the way data centers are powered and operated, with the potential to significantly improve efficiency and sustainability in the sector. The unveiling of Stella Nova is expected to drive innovation and advancement in data center technology.
news.headline: Nexans reveals world-first demo for electrifying data center infrastructures with Stella Nova inauguration.

news.summary: A highly experienced global HR executive with significant expertise in franchise and healthcare industries, having served as Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) at prominent companies such as Kimberly-Clark, Tenet Healthcare, and Yum! Restaurants International, is set to join a board.
news.headline: Sandi Karrmann appointed as Director at The Joint Corp, with extensive experience in HR and healthcare roles.

news.summary: The company New Eden has introduced a new benefit for its members, allowing them to access AI-powered workout plans from Aaptiv for free, with no need for any purchase or credit card information. This announcement was made in Denver on June 4, 2025. Eden, known for its advancements in digital health solutions focused on metabolic wellness, has unveiled this initiative as part of their new free wellness community program.
news.headline: Eden offers free AI workout plans with no purchase needed, expanding access to digital wellness.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached a total of 250,000, with 10,000 new cases reported in the past week alone. The death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 500 new fatalities recorded in the same week. Additionally, there are currently 50,000 active cases being treated in hospitals, while 195,000 people have recovered from the virus. Authorities are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the pandemic.
news.headline: Kazakh Shoqan School, by Kenges Rakishev and Aselle Tasmagambetova, debuts 1 billion tenge bond on KASE - a milestone.

news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller expressed concerns about the possibility of tariff-induced inflation causing a temporary increase in prices. He mentioned that there could be rate cuts later in 2025, depending on the clarity of trade policies and economic conditions. During a conference in Seoul, Waller discussed two tariff scenarios that might lead to inflation peaking at 3-5% this year. He currently anticipates a 15% trade-weighted tariff on U.S. goods imports, which falls between his previously analyzed high and low tariff scenarios. President Trump recently criticized Fed Chair Jerome Powell for not reducing rates, summoning him to the White House. Waller's cautious approach reflects the uncertainty in trade policies and economic stability.
news.headline: Fed's Waller warns of tariff-driven inflation risks, hints at potential 2025 rate cuts. Inflation may peak at 3-5%. Contingent on trade policy clarity and economic stability. President Trump criticizes Fed Chair for not cutting rates.

news.summary: This week, the president plans to increase tariffs on steel and aluminum despite ongoing legal challenges to other tariffs.
news.headline: Trump plans to increase tariffs on steel and aluminum amidst legal challenges to other tariffs.
Dollar Tree predicts profit drop, shares fall; significant impact ahead for investors.

news.summary: In a strategic move, Uniphore has introduced Marketing Agents, a cutting-edge Agentic AI suite designed for enterprise use. This innovative suite offers natural language search, segmentation, and knowledge within the Customer Data Platform (CDP). Uniphore's Marketing Agents is the first of its kind in the market, aiming to revolutionize customer interactions and data management. The suite is set to bring significant advancements in AI technology, benefitting businesses with enhanced marketing capabilities. This launch is expected to make a remarkable impact on the industry owing to its unique features and functionalities.
news.headline: Uniphore launches Marketing Agents, offering AI-powered automation to marketers, providing natural language search, segmentation, and knowledge in the CDP.
EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: We discussed things we believe we could work better together with the US, such as AI chips, semiconductors, critical materials, and energy security
EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: We should do the most to get the deal before July 9th

news.summary: Over the last month, the price of Ether has surged by 46%. Analysts are attributing this growth to the increasing demand for spot Ethereum ETFs and a strengthening market structure. This positive trend suggests that a breakout may be on the horizon for Ether.
news.headline: ETH price up 46% in 30 days, likely for a major breakout against BTC. Demand for Ethereum ETFs and strong structure support this view.

news.summary: New data released today revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6%, marking the lowest level in the past decade. The report indicates that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding economists' expectations. This growth was primarily driven by the services sector, which saw a significant increase in hiring. Additionally, average hourly wages rose by 3.2% compared to the previous year, suggesting improvements in overall worker compensation. Experts are optimistic about these trends and predict further economic expansion in the coming months.
news.headline: FiscalNote will be present at investor events to discuss company updates and financial performance.

news.summary: In Tucker, Georgia, GMS Inc. (NYSE:GMS), a prominent distributor of building products in North America, will unveil its financial results for the fiscal quarter and year concluding on April 30, 2025, before the market opens on the NYSE on Wednesday, June 18, 2025. Following this disclosure, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. EST to analyze the financial outcomes, address recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer session.
news.headline: GMS to release Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results on June 18, 2025 before NYSE market opens, with conference call at 8:30 am EST.
